thread.title: “Wealthy” Nations, Like the US, Will Pay Out $300B to the World
thread.title_full: “Wealthy” Nations, Like the US, Will Pay Out $300B to the World

author: M DOWLING
title: “Wealthy” Nations, Like the US, Will Pay Out $300B to the World
text:
By M DOWLING - November 23, 2024 0 67
The world agreed to $300 billion for climate change. The “wealthy” countries, including the United States, will provide the money and give it to the “poor” countries, which dictators generally run.
The world agreed to a new climate deal at COP29 in Baku, Azerbaijan, Saturday. So-called wealthy countries pledged to provide $300 billion annually by 2035 to poorer countries. It’s allegedly to help them cope with the increasingly catastrophic impacts of the climate crisis. The developing countries believe its vastly inadequate.
Do NOT Fall for “Numismatic Coins-Put BULLION in Your Safe or Backing Your Retirement Instead The agreement came after more than two weeks of bitter divisions, fractious negotiations, boycotts, political spats, and open celebrations of fossil fuels.
Eventually, nearly 200 countries – which is every country – agreed.
Why Physical Precious Metals Are the Retirement Safe Haven Most Older Christians Seek How can the United States be considered “wealthy?” We’re nearly bankrupt and owe $36 trillion we will never pay off. We can barely pay the interest.
The United States is no longer wealthy, and climate change is being used to redistribute wealth and impoverish the West. Our leaders are very stupid.
